# PartyApp - Event Management Mobile App

This is a React Native TypeScript project for a cross-platform event management application.

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] ✅ Verify copilot-instructions.md file - Created workspace structure
- [x] ✅ Clarify Project Requirements - React Native TypeScript event management app
- [x] ✅ Scaffold the Project - Manual setup with all necessary dependencies
- [x] ✅ Customize the Project - Implemented full PartyApp functionality
- [x] ✅ Install Required Extensions - React Native Tools, ES7+ Snippets, Prettier, ESLint
- [x] ✅ Compile the Project - TypeScript compilation successful
- [x] ✅ Create and Run Task - Metro bundler task configured
- [x] ✅ Launch the Project - Ready for development
- [x] ✅ Ensure Documentation is Complete - README and documentation finalized

## App Features ✅
- ✅ Event creation with photo upload form
- ✅ Event listing with categories (Hausparty, Party, Festival, Konzert)
- ✅ Event details view with full information
- ✅ Modern dark theme UI matching provided screenshots
- ✅ Cross-platform (Android & iOS) compatibility
- ✅ TypeScript implementation for type safety
- ✅ Redux Toolkit for state management
- ✅ React Navigation for screen navigation

## Technology Stack ✅
- ✅ React Native 0.81.4
- ✅ TypeScript 5.9.2
- ✅ React Navigation (Stack & Tab Navigation)
- ✅ Redux Toolkit + React Redux
- ✅ React Native Image Picker
- ✅ React Native Vector Icons
- ✅ React Native Gesture Handler
- ✅ React Native Safe Area Context

## Development Setup ✅
- ✅ Package.json configured with all necessary scripts
- ✅ TypeScript configuration optimized for React Native
- ✅ Babel and Metro bundler configured
- ✅ ESLint and Prettier for code quality
- ✅ VS Code tasks for development workflow
- ✅ Project structure organized with src/ folder

## Next Steps for Production 🚀
- Add backend integration for event persistence
- Implement user authentication system
- Add real image upload to cloud storage
- Implement push notifications
- Add map integration for event locations
- Set up automated testing
- Configure CI/CD pipeline
